name: cloud-sdk-api-aws-design-documentation

entries.summary: Created new session for module review and design documentation task

entries.summary: Created cloud SDK design documentation and matplotlib diagram generator

Added docs/cloud-sdk-design/generate_design_diagrams.py to generate architecture-overview, interface-implementation-map, and runtime-delivery-pipeline diagrams in PNG/SVG.

entries.summary: Verified diagram generation with configured Python venv
entries.detail: Configured python environment, bootstrapped pip in .venv using ensurepip, installed matplotlib, and successfully executed: c:/Users/akundu/projects/mercury-services-commons/.venv/Scripts/python.exe docs/cloud-sdk-design/generate_design_diagrams.py
